Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF HD SUPPLY WATERWORKS FP WEST's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant 1250 Missouri Street LLC's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant 1250 Missouri Street LLC is ordered to respond to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant 1250 Missouri Street LLC in the amount of $377.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF HD SUPPLY WATERWORKS F P WEST's Motion To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Requests For Admission propounded to Defendant 1250 Missouri Street LLC are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant 1250 Missouri Street LLC in the amount of $265, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
